market_pulse: Friday momentum building with XS/Encore headliners (Kaskade, The Chainsmokers) competing with OMNIA (Steve Aoki) and LIV's MetroBoomin; weekend readiness peak across all major venues with strong Instagram engagement on talent lineups.

weekend_readiness.label: PEAK
factors: Multiple Friday-Saturday headline acts across 4+ major venues
High social engagement on talent announcements
LIV Beach launching new Sunday Circuit wellness experience
Strong promoter activity on all platforms
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Double down on Friday/Saturday talent posts — match competitor energy with exclusive behind-the-scenes content from MetroBoomin/CrankDat sets.

content_gaps.description: Competitors (XS, OMNIA, Zouk) using official remix audio tracks in reels; LIV lagging behind on music production integrations
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create exclusive MetroBoomin remix edits for TikTok/IG Reels; sync with official releases

content_gaps.description: Encore/Palm Tree dominating 'bottle service cabana' POV content; LIV missing VIP experience micro-narratives
content_gaps.suggested_action: Film short 'day-in-the-life' stories from LIV promoters showing client experiences — personal touch vs. product focus

content_gaps.description: LIV Beach has 'Sunday Circuit' wellness angle but not leveraging on social — competitors lack this positioning
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create fitness + recovery + nightlife content pillars; hashtag #SundayCircuit, partner with wellness influencers
